tagline: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.1.
what_it_does: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.1. New features DATETIMEOFFSET data type support for Microsoft Azure Synapse: The DATETIMEOFFSET data type is supported for Microsoft Azure Synapse connections. Google BigQuery table comments: Google BigQuery table descriptions are resolved and exposed as table comments.
why_it_matters: The function runs on the Photon engine for improved performance.

capabilities.title: stestimatesrid function: Estimates the best
capabilities.desc: stestimatesrid function: Estimates the best projected spatial reference identifier (SRID) for an input geometry.

capabilities.title: stforce2d function: Converts a geography
capabilities.desc: stforce2d function: Converts a geography or geometry to its 2D representation.

capabilities.title: stnrings function: Counts the total
capabilities.desc: stnrings function: Counts the total number of rings in a polygon or multipolygon, including both exterior and interior rings.

capabilities.title: stnumpoints function: Counts the number
capabilities.desc: stnumpoints function: Counts the number of non-empty points in a geography or geometry. Photon support for geospatial functions…

key_takeaway: This serverless compute release roughly corresponds to Databricks Runtime 18.1.
